definition: Introduce yourself, establish credibility, and articulate value in video intros.
rationale: Both members are load-bearing, specific, falsifiable, and describe complementary sub-parts of a single framework (self-introduction + credibility proof + value promise).

kick_members.reason: Vague blanket statement (A4) without quantified anchor or named conditions; generic actor 'owners' without resolution (A1); no falsifiable mechanism.

rationale: Fails NODE-QUALITY-RUBRIC §C: resolvable referents (unbound 'owners'), and falsifiability (claims 'vast majority' with no N, no comparison group, no mechanism for why standards aren't communicated).

definition: Extract patterns from your own sales, content, and customer data at scale.
rationale: Both members assert the same load-bearing mechanism: analyzing your own performance data (not external models) reveals actionable patterns; high similarity confirms single concept.
